mission.title: opentelemetry: Add SIG names to Youtube uploads and organize them into playlists again
mission.description: Add SIG names to Youtube uploads and organize them into playlists again. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentelemetry deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentelemetry version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry
helm list -n opentelemetry 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentelemetry installation.

steps.title: Review opentelemetry configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentelemetry configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry
```
It seems that the videos used to have SIG name in them and they used to be filed under a SIG-specific playlist, but it stopped around October 2020. Could we bring this back? It's difficult to find relevant videos the way it is right now.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add SIG names to Youtube uploads and organize them into…
steps.description:
New meeting workflow is to no longer upload meetings to YouTube, but instead to make Zoom cloud recordings available via Google spreadsheet using Zapier integration:

Here's an example recording: https://zoom.us/rec/share/6VEDYb5zV-hDAT-mDr5W_A9FDYrE6WyTeWMRWz8xqKgJKOypdEwr9rDDerW2xMDj.zz6qA84Yxqces8s4

Note that this includes Zoom chat messages which YouTube videos were previously missing.

The naming relies on splitting out separate Zoom ID per meeting series, which is documented in #1415.

I

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add SIG names to Youtube uploads and organize them into…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
New meeting workflow is to no longer upload meetings to YouTube, but instead to make Zoom cloud recordings available via Google spreadsheet using Zapier integration:

Here's an example recording: https://zoom.us/rec/share/6VEDYb5zV-hDAT-mDr5W_A9FDYrE6WyTeWMRWz8xqKgJKOypdEwr9rDDerW2xMDj.zz6qA84Yxqces8s4

Note that this includes Zoom chat messages which YouTube videos were previously missing.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry installed or the issue environment reproducible.
